ksa_text: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("runbooks?", "technical document"). STRM composite score is strong (0.4218, top tier for this dataset); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
